contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 1
contoh.q: Apakah fungsi berikut mempunyai limit untuk $x$ mendekati 1? $$f(x) = \begin{cases} x^2 & \text{jika } x \leq 1 \\ x + 1 & \text{jika } x > 1 \end{cases}$$
contoh.p:
Hitung limit kiri dan limit kanan secara terpisah.

Limit kiri (gunakan $f(x)=x^2$, karena $x\leq 1$): $$\lim_{x \to 1^-} f(x) = \lim_{x \to 1^-} x^2 = 1^2 = 1$$ Limit kanan (gunakan $f(x)=x+1$, karena $x>1$): $$\lim_{x \to 1^+} f(x) = \lim_{x \to 1^+} (x+1) = 1+1 = 2$$
Karena limit kiri $\neq$ limit kanan ($1 \neq 2$), maka $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 1} f(x)$ tidak ada.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 2
contoh.q:
Tentukan nilai limit berikut menggunakan sifat-sifat limit.
(a) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 2} 5$   (b) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 3} 2x^3$   (c) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 1} (x^2 + x)$   (d) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 3} \dfrac{x^2 - 1}{x + 1}$   (e) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 3} \sqrt[3]{x^2 - 1}$
contoh.p:
(a) Sifat (1): $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 2} 5 = \boxed{5}$

(b) Sifat (2): $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 3} 2x^3 = 2 \cdot 3^3 = 2 \cdot 27 = \boxed{54}$

(c) Sifat (3) dan (2): $$\lim_{x\to 1}(x^2 + x) = \lim_{x\to 1} x^2 + \lim_{x\to 1} x = 1^2 + 1 = \boxed{2}$$ (d) Sifat (5), (3), dan (1): $$\lim_{x\to 3}\frac{x^2-1}{x+1} = \frac{\lim_{x\to 3}x^2 - \lim_{x\to 3}1}{\lim_{x\to 3}x + \lim_{x\to 3}1} = \frac{3^2 - 1}{3 + 1} = \frac{8}{4} = \boxed{2}$$ (e) Sifat (7) dan (3): $$\lim_{x\to 3}\sqrt[3]{x^2-1} = \sqrt[3]{\lim_{x\to 3}x^2 - \lim_{x\to 3}1} = \sqrt[3]{3^2 - 1} = \sqrt[3]{8} = \boxed{2}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 3
contoh.q:
Jika diketahui $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 2} f(x) = 5$ dan $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 2} g(x) = -4$, hitunglah nilai:
(a) $\lim_{x\to 2}\left[2f(x) + 3g(x)\right]^2$   (b) $\lim_{x\to 2}\left[g^2(x) - 6\right]^3$
contoh.p: (a) Sifat (2), (3), dan (6): $$\lim_{x\to 2}\left[2f(x)+3g(x)\right]^2 = \left[2\lim_{x\to 2}f(x) + 3\lim_{x\to 2}g(x)\right]^2 = \left[2(5)+3(-4)\right]^2 = (-2)^2 = \boxed{4}$$ (b) Sifat (4) dan (6): $$\lim_{x\to 2}\left[g^2(x)-6\right]^3 = \left[\left(\lim_{x\to 2}g(x)\right)^2 - 6\right]^3 = \left[(-4)^2 - 6\right]^3 = [10]^3 = \boxed{1000}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 4
contoh.p: (a) Faktorkan pembilang dan penyebut, lalu gunakan sifat (5) dan (6): $$\begin{align*} &\left[\lim_{x\to 2}\frac{x^2+2x-8}{x^2-6x+8}\right]^2\left[\lim_{x\to 2}\frac{x^2+6x-16}{x^2+x-6}\right]^3 \\ &= \left[\lim_{x\to 2}\frac{(x+4)(x-2)}{(x-4)(x-2)}\right]^2\left[\lim_{x\to 2}\frac{(x+8)(x-2)}{(x+3)(x-2)}\right]^3 \\ &= \left[\lim_{x\to 2}\frac{x+4}{x-4}\right]^2\left[\lim_{x\to 2}\frac{x+8}{x+3}\right]^3 = \left[\frac{6}{-2}\right]^2\left[\frac{10}{5}\right]^3 = (-3)^2 \cdot 2^3 = 9 \cdot 8 = \boxed{72} \end{align*}$$ (b) Faktorkan pembilang dan penyebut, lalu gunakan sifat (5) dan (7): $$\begin{align*} &\left[\lim_{x\to 3}\frac{(x+6)(x-3)}{(x-4)(x-3)}\right]\sqrt{\lim_{x\to 3}\frac{(x+5)(x-3)}{(x-2)(x-3)}} = \left[\frac{3+6}{3-4}\right]\sqrt{\frac{3+5}{3-2}} = (-9)\sqrt{8} = -9 \cdot 2\sqrt{2} = \boxed{-18\sqrt{2}} \end{align*}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 6
contoh.q:
Hitunglah nilai-nilai limit berikut menggunakan substitusi langsung.
(a) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 4}\frac{x^2 - 3x + 1}{2x + 5}$   (b) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 2}\sqrt{3x^2 - 2x + 1}$
contoh.p: (a) Substitusi $x = 4$ (penyebut $\neq 0$): $$\lim_{x\to 4}\frac{x^2 - 3x + 1}{2x + 5} = \frac{4^2 - 3(4) + 1}{2(4) + 5} = \frac{16 - 12 + 1}{13} = \boxed{\dfrac{5}{13}}$$ (b) Substitusi $x = 2$ (nilai di dalam akar $> 0$): $$\lim_{x\to 2}\sqrt{3x^2 - 2x + 1} = \sqrt{3(4) - 4 + 1} = \sqrt{9} = \boxed{3}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 7
contoh.p: (a) Cek: $\frac{9+6-15}{9-12+3} = \frac{0}{0}$ (bentuk tak tentu, gunakan faktorisasi): $$\lim_{x\to 3} \frac{x^2 + 2x - 15}{x^2 - 4x + 3} = \lim_{x\to 3} \frac{(x+5)(x-3)}{(x-1)(x-3)} = \lim_{x\to 3} \frac{x+5}{x-1} = \frac{3+5}{3-1} = \boxed{4}$$ (b) Cek: $\frac{16-32+16}{16-24+8} = \frac{0}{0}$ (bentuk tak tentu): $$\lim_{x\to 4} \frac{x^2 - 8x + 16}{x^2 - 6x + 8} = \lim_{x\to 4} \frac{(x-4)(x-4)}{(x-4)(x-2)} = \lim_{x\to 4} \frac{x-4}{x-2} = \frac{4-4}{4-2} = \boxed{0}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 8
contoh.p: (a) Misalkan $p = x^2$: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to 1} \frac{x^4 + 3x^2 - 4}{x^2 + x - 2} &= \lim_{x\to 1} \frac{(p+4)(p-1)}{(x+2)(x-1)} = \lim_{x\to 1} \frac{(x^2+4)(x^2-1)}{(x+2)(x-1)} \\ &= \lim_{x\to 1} \frac{(x^2+4)(x+1)(x-1)}{(x+2)(x-1)} = \lim_{x\to 1} \frac{(x^2+4)(x+1)}{x+2} = \frac{(1+4)(1+1)}{1+2} = \boxed{\dfrac{10}{3}} \end{align*}$$ (b) $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to 2} \frac{x^3 + 3x^2 - 10x}{x^3 - 4x^2 + 4x} &= \lim_{x\to 2} \frac{x(x^2+3x-10)}{x(x^2-4x+4)} = \lim_{x\to 2} \frac{(x+5)(x-2)}{(x-2)^2} = \lim_{x\to 2} \frac{x+5}{x-2} = \frac{7}{0} = \boxed{\infty} \end{align*}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 10
contoh.p: (a) Misalkan $h = x - 2$: $$\lim_{x\to 2} \frac{(x-2)^2 + 3(x-2)}{2(x-2)} = \lim_{h \to 0} \frac{h^2 + 3h}{2h} = \lim_{h \to 0} \frac{h(h + 3)}{2h} = \lim_{h \to 0} \frac{h + 3}{2} = \frac{3}{2} = \boxed{\dfrac{3}{2}}$$ (b) Misalkan $h = x - 2$: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{h\to 0}\left(\frac{h(h+4)}{3h} + \frac{h^2}{h(h+4)}\right) = \lim_{h\to 0}\left(\frac{h+4}{3} + \frac{h}{h+4}\right) = \frac{4}{3} + 0 = \boxed{\dfrac{4}{3}} \end{align*}$$ (c) Misalkan $h = x - 1$: $$\lim_{x\to 1} \frac{x^3 - 3x + 2}{(x-1)^2 + 2(x^2-1)} = \lim_{h \to 0} \frac{h^2(h+3)}{h(3h+4)} = \lim_{h \to 0} \frac{h(h+3)}{3h+4} = \frac{0}{4} = \boxed{0}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 11
contoh.q: Tentukanlah nilai $a$ dan $b$ jika $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 2}\frac{x^2 + ax + b}{x^2 - x - 2} = \frac{5}{3}$.
contoh.p: Faktorkan penyebut: $x^2 - x - 2 = (x-2)(x+1)$. Penyebut nol di $x = 2$. Agar limit berhingga, pembilang harus nol di $x = 2$: $$(2)^2 + a(2) + b = 0 \implies b = -4 - 2a \quad \cdots (1)$$ Tulis $x^2 + ax + b = (x-2)(x-r)$. Dengan mengembangkan: $a = -(2+r)$, $b = 2r$. Substitusikan ke nilai limit: $$\lim_{x\to 2}\frac{(x-2)(x-r)}{(x-2)(x+1)} = \lim_{x\to 2}\frac{x-r}{x+1} = \frac{2-r}{3} = \frac{5}{3}$$ $$2 - r = 5 \implies r = -3$$ Maka: $a = -(2+(-3)) = 1$ dan $b = 2(-3) = -6$. Verifikasi: $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 2}\frac{x^2+x-6}{x^2-x-2} = \lim_{x\to 2}\frac{(x+3)(x-2)}{(x+1)(x-2)} = \frac{5}{3}$ ✓ $$\boxed{a = 1,\quad b = -6}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 12
contoh.p: (a) Kalikan dengan sekawan $\dfrac{\sqrt{x}+\sqrt{3}}{\sqrt{x}+\sqrt{3}}$: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to 3} \frac{x^2 + 3x - 18}{\sqrt{x} - \sqrt{3}} &= \lim_{x\to 3} \frac{(x+6)(x-3)}{\sqrt{x}-\sqrt{3}} \cdot \frac{\sqrt{x}+\sqrt{3}}{\sqrt{x}+\sqrt{3}} = \lim_{x\to 3} \frac{(x+6)(x-3)(\sqrt{x}+\sqrt{3})}{x - 3} \\ &= \lim_{x\to 3} (x+6)(\sqrt{x}+\sqrt{3}) = (3+6)(\sqrt{3}+\sqrt{3}) = 9 \cdot 2\sqrt{3} = \boxed{18\sqrt{3}} \end{align*}$$ (b) Kalikan dengan sekawan $\dfrac{\sqrt{x}+2}{\sqrt{x}+2}$: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to 4} \frac{\sqrt{x}-2}{x^2-16} &= \lim_{x\to 4} \frac{\sqrt{x}-2}{(x-4)(x+4)} \cdot \frac{\sqrt{x}+2}{\sqrt{x}+2} = \lim_{x\to 4} \frac{x-4}{(x-4)(x+4)(\sqrt{x}+2)} \\ &= \lim_{x\to 4} \frac{1}{(x+4)(\sqrt{x}+2)} = \frac{1}{(4+4)(\sqrt{4}+2)} = \frac{1}{8 \cdot 4} = \boxed{\dfrac{1}{32}} \end{align*}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 13
contoh.p: (a) Kalikan dengan sekawan masing-masing: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to 2}\frac{2-\sqrt{x+2}}{3-\sqrt{3x+3}} &= \lim_{x\to 2}\frac{(4-(x+2))(3+\sqrt{3x+3})}{(9-(3x+3))(2+\sqrt{x+2})} = \lim_{x\to 2}\frac{(2-x)(3+\sqrt{3x+3})}{3(2-x)(2+\sqrt{x+2})} \\ &= \lim_{x\to 2}\frac{3+\sqrt{3x+3}}{3(2+\sqrt{x+2})} = \frac{3+\sqrt{9}}{3(2+\sqrt{4})} = \frac{6}{3 \cdot 4} = \boxed{\dfrac{1}{2}} \end{align*}$$ (b) Kalikan dengan dua sekawan: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to 3}\frac{\sqrt{x}-\sqrt{3}}{\sqrt{x+1}-2} &= \lim_{x\to 3}\frac{(x-3)(\sqrt{x+1}+2)}{(x-3)(\sqrt{x}+\sqrt{3})} = \lim_{x\to 3}\frac{\sqrt{x+1}+2}{\sqrt{x}+\sqrt{3}} = \frac{\sqrt{4}+2}{\sqrt{3}+\sqrt{3}} = \frac{4}{2\sqrt{3}} = \boxed{\dfrac{2\sqrt{3}}{3}} \end{align*}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 14
contoh.p: (a) Misalkan $h = x - 4$. Kalikan dengan sekawan $\dfrac{\sqrt{h+4}+2}{\sqrt{h+4}+2}$: $$\begin{align*} &= \lim_{h\to 0}\frac{h^2}{(\sqrt{h+4}-2)(h^2+2h)} \cdot \frac{\sqrt{h+4}+2}{\sqrt{h+4}+2} = \lim_{h\to 0}\frac{h^2(\sqrt{h+4}+2)}{h \cdot h(h+2)} = \lim_{h\to 0}\frac{\sqrt{h+4}+2}{h+2} = \frac{\sqrt{4}+2}{0+2} = \frac{4}{2} = \boxed{2} \end{align*}$$ (b) Misalkan $h = x - 9$. Kalikan dengan sekawan $\dfrac{\sqrt{h+9}+3}{\sqrt{h+9}+3}$: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{h\to 0}\frac{h^2 + 4h}{\sqrt{h+9}-3} &= \lim_{h\to 0}\frac{h(h+4)(\sqrt{h+9}+3)}{h} = \lim_{h\to 0}(h+4)(\sqrt{h+9}+3) = 4(\sqrt{9}+3) = 4 \cdot 6 = \boxed{24} \end{align*}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 15
contoh.p: Rasionalisasi lapisan luar terlebih dahulu dengan sekawan $\sqrt{1+\sqrt{1+x}}+\sqrt{2}$: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{\sqrt{1+\sqrt{1+x}}-\sqrt{2}}{x} &= \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{\bigl(1+\sqrt{1+x}\bigr)-2}{x\bigl(\sqrt{1+\sqrt{1+x}}+\sqrt{2}\bigr)} = \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{\sqrt{1+x}-1}{x\bigl(\sqrt{1+\sqrt{1+x}}+\sqrt{2}\bigr)} \end{align*}$$ Kemudian rasionalisasi lapisan dalam dengan sekawan $\sqrt{1+x}+1$: $$\begin{align*} &= \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{(1+x)-1}{x\bigl(\sqrt{1+\sqrt{1+x}}+\sqrt{2}\bigr)\bigl(\sqrt{1+x}+1\bigr)} = \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{1}{\bigl(\sqrt{1+\sqrt{1+x}}+\sqrt{2}\bigr)\bigl(\sqrt{1+x}+1\bigr)} \\ &= \frac{1}{(\sqrt{2}+\sqrt{2})(1+1)} = \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}\cdot 2} = \boxed{\dfrac{1}{4\sqrt{2}} = \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{8}} \end{align*}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 16
contoh.p: Cek substitusi: $x=2$ menghasilkan $\tfrac{\sqrt{9}-3}{0} = \tfrac{0}{0}$. Kalikan dengan sekawan $\sqrt{x^2+5}+3$, lalu faktorkan: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to 2}\frac{\sqrt{x^2+5}-3}{x^2-2x} &= \lim_{x\to 2}\frac{(x^2+5)-9}{x(x-2)\bigl(\sqrt{x^2+5}+3\bigr)} = \lim_{x\to 2}\frac{x^2-4}{x(x-2)\bigl(\sqrt{x^2+5}+3\bigr)} \\ &= \lim_{x\to 2}\frac{(x-2)(x+2)}{x(x-2)\bigl(\sqrt{x^2+5}+3\bigr)} = \lim_{x\to 2}\frac{x+2}{x\bigl(\sqrt{x^2+5}+3\bigr)} = \frac{4}{2(\sqrt{9}+3)} = \frac{4}{12} = \boxed{\dfrac{1}{3}} \end{align*}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 17
contoh.p: Agar kedua akar terdefinisi dan limit berhingga, keduanya harus nol di $x=3$: $$\sqrt{3+a} - \sqrt{b-3} = 0 \implies 3 + a = b - 3 \implies b = a + 6 \quad \cdots (1)$$ Tulis pembilang sebagai selisih dua akar lalu kalikan dengan sekawan $\sqrt{x+a}+\sqrt{b-x}$: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to 3}\frac{\sqrt{x+a}-\sqrt{b-x}}{x-3} &= \lim_{x\to 3}\frac{(x+a)-(b-x)}{(x-3)\bigl(\sqrt{x+a}+\sqrt{b-x}\bigr)} = \lim_{x\to 3}\frac{2x+a-b}{(x-3)\bigl(\sqrt{x+a}+\sqrt{b-x}\bigr)} \end{align*}$$ Substitusi $b = a+6$: $2x + a - b = 2(x-3)$. Maka: $$\lim_{x\to 3}\frac{2(x-3)}{(x-3)\bigl(\sqrt{x+a}+\sqrt{b-x}\bigr)} = \frac{2}{2\sqrt{3+a}} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3+a}} = \frac{1}{2}$$ $$\sqrt{3+a} = 2 \implies a = 1, \quad b = 7$$ Verifikasi: $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 3}\frac{\sqrt{x+1}-\sqrt{7-x}}{x-3} = \lim_{x\to 3}\frac{2(x-3)}{(x-3)\cdot 2\sqrt{x+1}} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{4}} = \frac{1}{2}$ ✓ $$\boxed{a = 1,\quad b = 7}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 18
contoh.p: Misalkan $\sqrt[3]{x} = p$, maka $x = p^3$ dan $x \to 1 \Rightarrow p \to 1$: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to 1} \frac{\sqrt[3]{x^2} - 2\sqrt[3]{x} + 1}{(x-1)^2} &= \lim_{p \to 1} \frac{p^2 - 2p + 1}{(p^3-1)^2} = \lim_{p \to 1} \frac{(p-1)^2}{\left[(p-1)(p^2+p+1)\right]^2} \\ &= \lim_{p \to 1} \frac{1}{(p^2+p+1)^2} = \frac{1}{(1+1+1)^2} = \boxed{\dfrac{1}{9}} \end{align*}$$

sections.title: Limit Fungsi Aljabar di Tak Hingga

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 19
contoh.q:
Tentukanlah hasil dari setiap limit berikut.
(a) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{6x^3 + 4x + 6}{4x^2 + 2x^3 - 3x}$   (b) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{2x^3-4x^2+3x^5}{x^3-2x^2-4}$   (c) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{5x^2 - 3}{2x^4 + x - 1}$
contoh.p: (a) Pangkat tertinggi $x^3$ ($p = q = 3$), bagi dengan $x^3$: $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{6x^3+4x+6}{4x^2+2x^3-3x} = \lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{6+\frac{4}{x^2}+\frac{6}{x^3}}{\frac{4}{x}+2-\frac{3}{x^2}} = \frac{6+0+0}{0+2-0} = \boxed{3}$$ (b) Pangkat tertinggi $x^5$ di pembilang, sedangkan penyebut hanya $x^3$ ($p > q$): $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{2x^3-4x^2+3x^5}{x^3-2x^2-4} = \lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{\frac{2}{x^2}-\frac{4}{x^3}+3}{1-\frac{2}{x}-\frac{4}{x^3}} \to \boxed{\infty}$$ (c) Derajat pembilang $p = 2$ lebih kecil dari penyebut $q = 4$: $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{5x^2-3}{2x^4+x-1} = \boxed{0}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 20
contoh.p: Uraikan pembilang: $(2x^2-3)(2x^3-x) = 4x^5-8x^3+3x$. Pangkat tertinggi $x^5$ ($p = q = 5$): $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{4x^5-8x^3+3x}{x^4+6x^5-3x^2+4} = \frac{4}{6} = \boxed{\dfrac{2}{3}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 21
contoh.p: Pembilang: $$\begin{align*} (3x^2-2x+1)(x^3+4x-5) &= 3x^5 - 2x^4 + 13x^3 - 23x^2 + 14x - 5 \end{align*}$$ Penyebut: $$\begin{align*} (2x^4-x^2+3)(x+2) - 6x^5 + 10 &= -4x^5 + 4x^4 - x^3 - 2x^2 + 3x + 16 \end{align*}$$ Pangkat tertinggi di pembilang maupun penyebut adalah $x^5$ ($p = q = 5$). Terapkan kaidah cepat: $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{3x^5 - 2x^4 + \cdots}{-4x^5 + 4x^4 + \cdots} = \frac{3}{-4} = \boxed{-\dfrac{3}{4}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 22
contoh.q:
Tentukanlah hasil dari setiap limit berikut.
(a) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{\sqrt{4x^2 + 3x - 1}}{2x - 5}$   (b) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{3x + 1}{\sqrt{9x^2 - x + 4}}$   (c) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to\infty}\left(\sqrt{x^2 + 5x} - x\right)$   (d) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{\sqrt{4x^2+x}-3x}{\sqrt{x^2+2}+x}$
contoh.p: (a) Untuk $x>0$: $\sqrt{4x^2+3x-1} = x\sqrt{4+\frac{3}{x}-\frac{1}{x^2}}$: $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{x\sqrt{4+\frac{3}{x}-\frac{1}{x^2}}}{x\left(2-\frac{5}{x}\right)} = \frac{\sqrt{4+0-0}}{2-0} = \frac{2}{2} = \boxed{1}$$ (b) Untuk $x>0$: $\sqrt{9x^2-x+4} = x\sqrt{9-\frac{1}{x}+\frac{4}{x^2}}$: $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{x\left(3+\frac{1}{x}\right)}{x\sqrt{9-\frac{1}{x}+\frac{4}{x^2}}} = \frac{3+0}{\sqrt{9-0+0}} = \frac{3}{3} = \boxed{1}$$ (c) Kalikan dengan sekawan $\dfrac{\sqrt{x^2+5x}+x}{\sqrt{x^2+5x}+x}$: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to\infty}\left(\sqrt{x^2+5x}-x\right) &= \lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{5x}{\sqrt{x^2+5x}+x} = \lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{5x}{x\left(\sqrt{1+\frac{5}{x}}+1\right)} = \frac{5}{\sqrt{1}+1} = \boxed{\dfrac{5}{2}} \end{align*}$$ (d) Bagi pembilang dan penyebut dengan $x$: $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{x\left(\sqrt{4+\frac{1}{x}}-3\right)}{x\left(\sqrt{1+\frac{2}{x^2}}+1\right)} = \frac{\sqrt{4}-3}{\sqrt{1}+1} = \frac{2-3}{1+1} = \boxed{-\dfrac{1}{2}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 23
contoh.p: Kedua akar linear ($a = c = 3$). Kalikan dengan sekawan: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to\infty}(\sqrt{3x+2}-\sqrt{3x-4}) &= \lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{(3x+2)-(3x-4)}{\sqrt{3x+2}+\sqrt{3x-4}} = \lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{6}{\sqrt{3x+2}+\sqrt{3x-4}} = \frac{6}{2\sqrt{3}} = \frac{6\sqrt{3}}{6} = \boxed{\sqrt{3}} \end{align*}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 24
contoh.p: (a) Koefisien $x^2$ sama ($a = d = 4$), gunakan kaidah cepat dengan $b = 3$, $e = -7$: $$= \lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{(4x^2+3x-5)-(4x^2-7x+2)}{\sqrt{4x^2+3x-5}+\sqrt{4x^2-7x+2}} = \lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{10x-7}{\sqrt{4x^2+3x-5}+\sqrt{4x^2-7x+2}} = \frac{10}{\sqrt{4}+\sqrt{4}} = \frac{10}{4} = \boxed{\dfrac{5}{2}}$$ (b) Koefisien $x^2$ sama ($a = d = 3$), $b = 8$, $e = 2$: $$= \frac{b-e}{2\sqrt{a}} = \frac{8-2}{2\sqrt{3}} = \frac{6}{2\sqrt{3}} = \boxed{\sqrt{3}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 25
contoh.p: Ubah ekspresi linear menjadi bentuk akar: $(2x-1) = \sqrt{(2x-1)^2} = \sqrt{4x^2-4x+1}$, sehingga: $$\lim_{x\to\infty}\left(\sqrt{4x^2-5x+3}-\sqrt{4x^2-4x+1}\right) = \frac{(-5)-(-4)}{2\sqrt{4}} = \frac{-1}{4} = \boxed{-\dfrac{1}{4}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 26
contoh.p: Untuk $x \to -\infty$, berlaku $x < 0$ sehingga $\sqrt{x^2} = |x| = -x$. Faktorkan $x^2$ dari dalam akar, lalu keluarkan $|x| = -x$: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to-\infty}\frac{\sqrt{4x^2+3x}}{2x+1} &= \lim_{x\to-\infty}\frac{\sqrt{x^2\!\left(4+\frac{3}{x}\right)}}{x\!\left(2+\frac{1}{x}\right)} = \lim_{x\to-\infty}\frac{|x|\sqrt{4+\frac{3}{x}}}{x\!\left(2+\frac{1}{x}\right)} \\ &= \lim_{x\to-\infty}\frac{-x\sqrt{4+\frac{3}{x}}}{x\!\left(2+\frac{1}{x}\right)} = \frac{-\sqrt{4+0}}{2+0} = \boxed{-1} \end{align*}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 27
contoh.p:
Agar limit tidak menuju $\pm\infty$, koefisien $x^2$ di bawah akar harus sama dengan $b^2$, yaitu $b^2 = 1$, sehingga $b = 1$ (diambil positif).

Dengan $b = 1$, kalikan dengan sekawan $\dfrac{\sqrt{x^2+ax+4}+x}{\sqrt{x^2+ax+4}+x}$: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to\infty}\left(\sqrt{x^2+ax+4}-x\right) &= \lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{ax+4}{\sqrt{x^2+ax+4}+x} = \lim_{x\to\infty}\frac{x\!\left(a+\frac{4}{x}\right)}{x\!\left(\sqrt{1+\frac{a}{x}+\frac{4}{x^2}}+1\right)} = \frac{a}{2} \end{align*}$$ Samakan dengan nilai limit yang diberikan: $\dfrac{a}{2} = 5 \implies a = 10$. $$\boxed{a = 10,\quad b = 1}$$ Verifikasi: $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to\infty}\left(\sqrt{x^2+10x+4}-x\right) = \dfrac{10}{2} = 5$ ✓

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 28
contoh.p: Rasionalisasi bagian dalam kurung terlebih dahulu: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to\infty} x\!\left(\sqrt{x^2+6x}-x\right) &= \lim_{x\to\infty} x \cdot \frac{(x^2+6x)-x^2}{\sqrt{x^2+6x}+x} = \lim_{x\to\infty} \frac{6x^2}{\sqrt{x^2+6x}+x} \\ &= \lim_{x\to\infty} \frac{6x^2}{x\!\left(\sqrt{1+\frac{6}{x}}+1\right)} = \lim_{x\to\infty} \frac{6x}{\sqrt{1+\frac{6}{x}}+1} \to \boxed{+\infty} \end{align*}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 29
contoh.p: Gunakan rumus pengembangan (1) dengan $a = 3$ dan $b = 5$: $$\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{\sin 3x}{5x} = \frac{3}{5} = \boxed{\dfrac{3}{5}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 30
contoh.q:
Tentukanlah hasil setiap limit fungsi trigonometri berikut.
(a) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\left[\frac{\sin 4x}{3x} - \frac{\tan 2x}{\sin 6x} + \frac{8x}{\tan 2x}\right]$
(b) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{\sin^2 6x}{3x \cdot \tan 4x}$
(c) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{2\tan^2 3x \cdot \sin 2x}{4x^2 \cdot \sin 6x}$
(d) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{6\sin^3 2x}{\sin 4x \cdot \sin 3x}$
contoh.p: (a) Terapkan rumus langsung pada setiap suku: $$\frac{4}{3} - \frac{2}{6} + \frac{8}{2} = \frac{4}{3} - \frac{1}{3} + 4 = 1 + 4 = \boxed{5}$$ (b) Urai menjadi dua rasio: $$\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{\sin 6x}{3x}\cdot\frac{\sin 6x}{\tan 4x} = \left(\frac{6}{3}\right)\left(\frac{6}{4}\right) = 2 \cdot \frac{3}{2} = \boxed{3}$$ (c) Susun ulang faktor-faktornya: $$\lim_{x\to 0}2\cdot\frac{\tan 3x}{4x}\cdot\frac{\tan 3x}{x}\cdot\frac{\sin 2x}{\sin 6x} = 2\cdot\frac{3}{4}\cdot\frac{3}{1}\cdot\frac{2}{6} = 2\cdot\frac{3}{4}\cdot3\cdot\frac{1}{3} = \boxed{\dfrac{3}{2}}$$ (d) Perhatikan $\sin 2x \to 0$ saat $x \to 0$, sehingga perkalian dengan konstanta tetap menghasilkan 0: $$\lim_{x\to 0}6\cdot\frac{\sin 2x}{\sin 4x}\cdot\frac{\sin 2x}{\sin 3x}\cdot\sin 2x = 6\cdot\frac{2}{4}\cdot\frac{2}{3}\cdot 0 = \boxed{0}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 31
contoh.q:
Tentukanlah hasil setiap limit fungsi trigonometri berikut.
(a) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\left[\frac{\sin 2x + 4x}{\sin 3x + \tan x}\right]$   (b) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\left[\frac{6x^2 + \sin^2 3x}{\tan^2 2x - x^2}\right]$
contoh.p: (a) Bagi pembilang dan penyebut dengan $x$: $$\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{\frac{\sin 2x}{x}+4}{\frac{\sin 3x}{x}+\frac{\tan x}{x}} = \frac{2+4}{3+1} = \frac{6}{4} = \boxed{\dfrac{3}{2}}$$ (b) Bagi pembilang dan penyebut dengan $x^2$: $$\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{6+\left(\frac{\sin 3x}{x}\right)^2}{\left(\frac{\tan 2x}{x}\right)^2-1} = \frac{6+9}{4-1} = \frac{15}{3} = \boxed{5}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 32
contoh.p: Misalkan $p = x - 3$, maka $p \to 0$: $$\lim_{x\to 3}\frac{5\sin(x-3)}{2(x-3)} = \lim_{p\to 0}\frac{5\sin p}{2p} = \frac{5}{2} = \boxed{\dfrac{5}{2}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 33
contoh.q:
Tentukanlah hasil setiap limit fungsi trigonometri berikut.
(a) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 2}\frac{3\sin(x-2)}{4x-8}$   (b) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 3}\frac{6\tan^2(2x-6)}{(3x-9)^2}$   (c) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 1}\frac{\tan(2x^2-6x+4)}{3x^2-9x+6}$
contoh.p: (a) Faktorkan penyebut: $4x - 8 = 4(x-2)$, lalu terapkan rumus: $$\lim_{x\to 2}\frac{3\sin(x-2)}{4(x-2)} = 3\cdot\frac{1}{4} = \boxed{\dfrac{3}{4}}$$ (b) Faktorkan: $6x - 6 = 6(x-3)$ dan $3x-9 = 3(x-3)$: $$\lim_{x\to 3}6\left(\frac{\tan 2(x-3)}{3(x-3)}\right)^2 = 6\left(\frac{2}{3}\right)^2 = 6\cdot\frac{4}{9} = \boxed{\dfrac{8}{3}}$$ (c) Faktorkan: $2x^2-6x+4 = 2(x-1)(x-2)$ dan $3x^2-9x+6 = 3(x-1)(x-2)$, sehingga faktor $(x-2)$ dapat dicoret: $$\lim_{x\to 1}\frac{\tan 2(x-1)(x-2)}{3(x-1)(x-2)} = \lim_{x\to 1}\frac{\tan 2(x-1)}{3(x-1)} = \frac{2}{3} = \boxed{\dfrac{2}{3}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 34
contoh.p: Gunakan identitas $1 - \cos 4x = 2\sin^2 2x$: $$\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{1-\cos 4x}{x^2} = \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{2\sin^2 2x}{x^2} = 2\left(\frac{\sin 2x}{x}\right)^2 \to 2\cdot 2^2 = \boxed{8}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 35
contoh.q:
Tentukanlah hasil setiap limit fungsi trigonometri berikut.
(a) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{1-\cos 6x}{\cos 8x - 1}$   (b) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{3\cos 4x - 3}{2\sin^2 3x}$   (c) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{4 - 4\cos 2x}{1 - \cos^2 3x}$
(d) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{2 - 2\cos^2 6x}{3\cos^2 2x - 3}$   (e) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{\cos 5x - \cos 3x}{1 - \cos 8x}$   (f) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{3\cos 6x - 3\cos 2x}{1 - \cos^2 2x}$
contoh.p: (a) Gunakan $1-\cos 2\theta = 2\sin^2\theta$: $$\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{1-\cos 6x}{\cos 8x-1} = \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{2\sin^2 3x}{-2\sin^2 4x} = -\lim_{x\to 0}\left(\frac{\sin 3x}{\sin 4x}\right)^2 = -\left(\frac{3}{4}\right)^2 = \boxed{-\dfrac{9}{16}}$$ (b) Gunakan $\cos 4x - 1 = -2\sin^2 2x$: $$\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{3\cos 4x-3}{2\sin^2 3x} = \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{-3\cdot 2\sin^2 2x}{2\sin^2 3x} = -3\left(\frac{2}{3}\right)^2 = -3\cdot\frac{4}{9} = \boxed{-\dfrac{4}{3}}$$ (c) Gunakan $1-\cos 2x = 2\sin^2 x$ dan $1-\cos^2 3x = \sin^2 3x$: $$\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{4(1-\cos 2x)}{1-\cos^2 3x} = \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{4\cdot 2\sin^2 x}{\sin^2 3x} = 8\left(\frac{1}{3}\right)^2 = \frac{8}{9} = \boxed{\dfrac{8}{9}}$$ (d) Gunakan $2-2\cos^2\theta = 2\sin^2\theta$ dan $\cos^2 2x - 1 = -\sin^2 2x$: $$\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{2\sin^2 6x}{-3\sin^2 2x} = -\frac{2}{3}\left(\frac{6}{2}\right)^2 = -\frac{2}{3}\cdot 9 = \boxed{-6}$$ (e) Gunakan $\cos A - \cos B = -2\sin\dfrac{A+B}{2}\sin\dfrac{A-B}{2}$ dan $1-\cos 8x = 2\sin^2 4x$: $$\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{\cos 5x-\cos 3x}{1-\cos 8x} = \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{-2\sin 4x\sin x}{2\sin^2 4x} = \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{-\sin x}{\sin 4x} = -\frac{1}{4} = \boxed{-\dfrac{1}{4}}$$ (f) Gunakan $\cos 6x - \cos 2x = -2\sin 4x\sin 2x$ dan $1-\cos^2 2x = \sin^2 2x$: $$\lim_{x\to 0}\frac{3(\cos 6x-\cos 2x)}{\sin^2 2x} = \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{-6\sin 4x\sin 2x}{\sin^2 2x} = \lim_{x\to 0}\frac{-6\sin 4x}{\sin 2x} = -6\cdot\frac{4}{2} = \boxed{-12}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 36
contoh.q:
Tentukanlah hasil setiap limit fungsi trigonometri berikut.
(a) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{2}}\frac{3\sin 4x}{\cos x}$   (b) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{4}}\frac{\sin 6x + \sin 2x}{\cos 5x + \cos x}$   (c) $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{2}}\frac{1-\sin x}{\cos^2 x}$
contoh.p: (a) Gunakan $\sin 4x = 2\sin 2x\cos 2x = 4\sin x\cos x\cos 2x$ agar faktor $\cos x$ bisa dicoret: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{2}}\frac{3\sin 4x}{\cos x} &= \lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{2}}\frac{3\cdot 4\sin x\cos x\cos 2x}{\cos x} = \lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{2}}12\sin x\cos 2x = 12\sin\frac{\pi}{2}\cos\pi = 12\cdot 1\cdot(-1) = \boxed{-12} \end{align*}$$ (b) Gunakan rumus jumlah sinus dan cosinus untuk menyederhanakan: $$\begin{align*} \lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{4}}\frac{\sin 6x+\sin 2x}{\cos 5x+\cos x} &= \lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{4}}\frac{2\sin 4x\cos 2x}{2\cos 3x\cos 2x} = \lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{4}}\frac{\sin 4x}{\cos 3x} = \frac{\sin\pi}{\cos\frac{3\pi}{4}} = \frac{0}{-\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}} = \boxed{0} \end{align*}$$ (c) Cek: substitusi $x = \tfrac{\pi}{2}$ memberikan $\tfrac{0}{0}$. Gunakan $\cos^2 x = (1-\sin x)(1+\sin x)$: $$\lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{2}}\frac{1-\sin x}{\cos^2 x} = \lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{2}}\frac{1-\sin x}{(1-\sin x)(1+\sin x)} = \lim_{x\to\frac{\pi}{2}}\frac{1}{1+\sin x} = \frac{1}{1+1} = \boxed{\dfrac{1}{2}}$$
